name: Sunken Garden Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice potatoes and cook in boiling water until tender.
2. Combine potatoes, celery, onion, eggs, crumbled bacon, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
3. Measure 1/3 cup pineapple juice into a medium saucepan. Stir in pineapple chunks, vinegar, sugar, and dry mustard. Heat to boiling.
4. Combine cornstarch and cold water in a small bowl. Stir into the pineapple mixture. Boil, stirring constantly until thickened.
5. Pour the thickened mixture over the potato mixture and mix gently.
6. Serve hot or cold.
